nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: Juliana had at least 1 son with Thomas De Coudray. She died about 1348, in Barton Stacey, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.
